programme.title: Ep. 1
programme.desc: S3 Ep1 - Eamonn Holmes e Ruth Langsford ci mostrano la vita e le abitazioni delle famiglie piu' benestanti del mondo. I due vengono invitati nel club super esclusivo di Flavio Briatore.

programme.title: Ep. 17
programme.desc: S21 Ep17 - Con la reputazione di Gordon Ramsay in gioco, i primi sei chef affrontano l'ultima sfida per subentrare nel piu' grande ristorante Hell's Kitchen del mondo.

programme.title: Ep. 18
programme.desc: S21 Ep18 - Con la reputazione di Gordon Ramsay in gioco, i primi sei chef affrontano l'ultima sfida. I restanti cinque cuochi casalinghi affronteranno due round di sfide.

programme.title: Ep. 9
programme.desc: S19 Ep7 - In diretta dal backstage, Mariasole Pollio cattura l'adrenalina e le emozioni dei protagonisti.

programme.title: Ep. 10
programme.desc: S1 Ep10 - Il padrone di casa Maurizio Santin sara' affiancato da 40 pasticceri di altissimo livello, dove verranno svelati i segreti della grande pasticceria, con golosissime ricette.

programme.title: Ep. 13
programme.desc: S2 Ep13 Neve, Tatoo, India e ...un lago! - Alessandra, Ivana, Kristine e Maria Elena dovranno commentare i matrimoni rivali e dare un voto su location, cibo, abito ed evento in generale. In palio una romantica luna di miele.

programme.title: Val Badia
programme.desc: S6 Ep6 Val Badia - Alessandro incontra Uli, Svetlana, Alma e Verena per eleggere il miglior ristorante di cucina ladina della Val Badia, ricca di ricette e ingredienti del territorio.

programme.title: Verona
programme.desc: S2 Ep8 Verona - Verona, la citta' dell'amore...e dell'accoglienza! Guidati da Bruno Barbieri, Andrea, Luisa, Tamara e Stefania si sfidano per decretare l'hotel migliore. Chi vincera'?

programme.title: Versilia

The Golf Fitness Show
programme.desc: An often-overlooked part of golf, fitness can improve your game in all sorts of ways. The Golf Fitness Show demonstrates the perfect exercises for the course.

programme.title: Mark Roe's Short Game School
programme.desc: Former European Tour player Mark Roe travels to Trentino in northern Italy to give tips to the amateur golfer on how to improve their short game.

programme.title: Best of the OpenZone
programme.desc: A look at the best moments from The Open Zone at Royal Birkdale in 2017, with masterclasses and demonstrations from some of golf's finest players.

programme.title: Best of the OpenZone
programme.desc: Remember the best moments from the 2018 Sky Sports Open Zone, with interviews and golf tips from around the golfing world at The Open at Carnoustie Golf Links.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Poulter: Short Game
programme.desc: The Golf Academy offers guidance and all the key tips and tricks on how to make your golfing game better. Here, Ian Poulter discusses improvements to the short game.

programme.title: Golf Academy:Davies ShortGame/Putt
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game from the tee to the green. Here, English golf legend Laura Davies offers shares her wisdom on the short game and putting.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, take an all-encompassing look at the art of driving. Ep 10.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, how to chip effectively close to the green. Ep 18.

programme.title: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Final-day action from the Hilton Grand Vacations Tournament of Champions, the opening event on the 2026 LPGA Tour calendar. A Lim Kim claimed victory in last year's season opener.

programme.title: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The 2026 Honda LPGA Thailand reaches its conclusion at Siam Country Club. Last year, the United States' Angel Yin claimed her second LPGA Tour win.

programme.title: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The final day of the 2026 HSBC Women's World Championship, staged at Sentosa Golf Club in Singapore. Lydia Ko clinched the crown this time last year on her 11th attempt.

programme.title: Ladies European Tour Golf Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2026 Amundi German Masters - a Ladies European Tour event staged at Green Eagle Golf Courses.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the Rose Ladies Series returns for 2026 at West Lancashire Golf Club.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Italian Challenge Open during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: Ladies European Tour Golf Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the MCB Ladies Classic. This is the Ladies European Tour's first visit to the Constance Belle Mare Plage in Mauritius, with a prize fund of €400,000 on offer.

programme.title: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The fourth and final round of the LPGA Tour's Kroger Queen City Championship, held at Maketewah Country Club. Last season, English star Charley Hull clinched a long-awaited victory.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Insperity Invitational - a PGA Tour Champions event at the Woodlands in Texas. The 2009 Champion Golfer of the Year Stewart Cink scooped last year's prize.

programme.title: PGA Tour: The Cut
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the PGA Tour. Follow the world's best players as they prepare for the big events in 2026.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Challenge De Catalunya during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: PGA Championship Final Round Hlts
